title: Dads who want nothing (campaign offer post)
hook: Your dad said he doesn't want anything. He's lying.
body:
He wants to sit in his chair in a room that smells like a cabin he's never been to.

Cedar & Smoke. Hand-poured, burns 50 hours, requires zero conversation about feelings.

20% off until Father's Day with code DAD20.
cta: Code DAD20 at checkout — ends Sunday.
sourceInsight: SAMPLE — campaign burst offer post; every campaign piece carries the code (demo).
